channel.title: Sklearn Training on Apache Texera
channel.description: Recent content in Sklearn Training on Apache Texera

item.title: Training: Adaptive Boosting
item.description:
Home > Machine Learning > Sklearn > Sklearn Training

Input Properties

Property Requirement Type Default Description
Target Attribute ✓ Column - Attribute in your dataset corresponding to target
Count Vectorizer Boolean false Convert a collection of text documents to a
matrix of token counts
Text Attribute String - Attribute in your dataset with text to vectorize
Tfidf Transformer Boolean false Transform a count matrix to a normalized tf or
tf-idf representation

Output Ports

Port Mode
0 Set Snapshot
